classic.notes: A full touchscreen redesign of Music Boss Classic for Pebble Time 2 and Round 2. Tap, swipe, and flick to control playback over full-screen album art. Three live layouts - Retro+, Modern Classic, and Modern Time - with deep customization from the on-watch menus: text position, multiple fonts and sizes, colours, drop shadow, album-art modes (full / letterbox), scrim, and one-tap presets. Double-press Up/Down to seek; volume ring overlay. Test build - your feedback shapes what ships.

browser.notes: The Media Browser is now fully touch-enabled on Pebble Time 2 and Round 2 - every menu is tap and scroll navigable.
